_comment: Maps n8n node types + parameter names to test data hints. Used by testRemoteWorkflowDirectly() to build better mock payloads and self-healing prompts.

n8n-nodes-base.slack._description: Slack node. blocksUi must be a valid JSON array of Block Kit blocks — never a plain string.

blocksUi.description: Must be a JSON array of Block Kit block objects. If a webhook body field is used here, that field must contain valid blocks JSON, not plain text.

text.description: Plain mrkdwn message text. Can use any string value.
text.sample: Test message from n8m validation suite

n8n-nodes-base.slackTrigger._description: Slack trigger — receives webhook events. No test payload hints needed.

n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest._description: HTTP Request node. body must match the expected content type.

body.description: Request body as JSON. The structure depends on the target API.

n8n-nodes-base.openAi._description: OpenAI node. prompt/userMessage must be a non-empty string.

prompt.description: The prompt to send. Must be a non-empty string.
prompt.sample: Summarize this in one sentence: Hello world.

userMessage.description: User message for chat completions. Must be a non-empty string.
userMessage.sample: Write a short test post about productivity.

sheetId.description: Spreadsheet ID from the sheet URL.

n8n-nodes-base.twitter._description: Twitter/X node. text must be ≤280 chars.

text.sample: Test post from n8m validation suite. #test

n8n-nodes-base.linkedIn._description: LinkedIn node. text/commentary must be a non-empty string.

text.sample: Sharing insights on productivity. This is a test post from n8m.

n8n-nodes-base.telegram._description: Telegram node. text must be a non-empty string.

text.description: Message text. Supports HTML/Markdown depending on parseMode.
text.sample: Test message from n8m validation suite.

n8n-nodes-base.discord._description: Discord node. text must be a non-empty string, max 2000 chars.

text.sample: Test message from n8m validation suite.

message.description: Email body. HTML or plain text.
message.sample: This is a test email sent by the n8m validation suite.

text.sample: Test email body from n8m validation.

n8n-nodes-base.notion._description: Notion node. pageId must be a valid UUID.

table.description: Table name exactly as it appears in Airtable.

n8n-nodes-base.html._description: HTML node. Generates HTML from a template expression. The 'html' parameter must be a valid HTML string or expression producing one.

html.description: HTML template string. Uses $json fields from the previous node. If this node accesses $json.body.content, the webhook payload must include 'content' as a plain text string.

n8n-nodes-base.markdown._description: Markdown node. Converts markdown text to HTML. The markdown field must be a string.

n8n-nodes-base.set._description: Set node. No special payload requirements — reads from upstream data.

n8n-nodes-base.if._description: IF node. No special payload requirements — evaluates conditions on upstream data.

n8n-nodes-base.code._description: Code node. No special payload requirements — runs JS/TS against upstream data.
